title: Playbook Analytics
description: Schema for .forge/playbook-analytics.json. Tracks per-playbook usage metrics, parameter frequency, common findings, and version history.

playbooks.description: Per-playbook analytics keyed by playbook name (kebab-case)

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last analytics update

success_count.description: Number of runs that reached SHIP

fail_count.description: Number of runs that failed or were aborted

avg_score.description: Average final quality score across all runs

avg_iterations.description: Average convergence iterations across all runs

avg_cost_usd.description: Average estimated cost in USD per run

last_used.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent invocation

parameter_frequency.description: Per-parameter value frequency. Keys are parameter names, values are objects mapping parameter values to occurrence counts. Top 5 values tracked plus an 'other' count.

common_findings.description: Finding categories that recur across playbook runs. Keys are category codes (e.g., SEC-INJECTION), values are occurrence counts.

version_history.description: Per-version run statistics ordered by version

runs.description: Number of runs with this version

avg_score.description: Average quality score for this version
